realTime.tip: Grok has real-time access to X (Twitter) - ask for current trends, live discussions, or recent events

directness.tip: Grok favors brevity - use TL;DR, In 3 bullet points, or Be direct for terse crisp answers

wit.tip: Grok responds well to humor prompts - specify with wit, humorously, or in a Hitchhiker Guide style

roleAssignment.tip: Assign Grok a persona - it embraces character-based framing effectively

unfiltered.tip: Tell Grok to be completely honest or do not sugarcoat for direct unvarnished analysis

antiPatterns.fix: Grok is built for directness - skip the pleasantries
Be explicit: concise, sharp, factual, no fluff
Use direct verbs: Summarize, Analyze, List, Explain

tips: Grok has live X (Twitter) access - frame prompts around current events or trends
Use Be direct, no fluff for Grok's most natural response style
Grok handles humor - add with wit or humorously for engaging tone
For real-time data, specify the time frame: In the last 24 hours on X
Grok rewards bluntness - say Do not sugarcoat this analysis
Avoid over-structuring prompts - Grok thrives on direct conversational instructions
